bottomQuartileNotes: Lowest coverage areas (see full report): src/App.tsx, src/components/** (except partial AiChat/helpers), src/hooks/useAtls.ts (hook body), orchestrator.ts, swarmChat.ts, subagentService.ts, many large panels. Services/utils batch pipeline are comparatively strong.
ciThresholds: See vite.config.ts coverage.thresholds — set slightly below this baseline to catch regressions.
